title: March 25th
content:
A smile spreads across my face, 
My countenance full of joy, 
He found love I think, 
Someone he could share his heart with. 

The sound of laughter echoing, 
Under the night sky,
As I read the messages on my laptop, 

The buzzing of the flies, 
Seeping in through the bars,
As they take a bite of my skin.

_"Pretty fun I guess,"_ the glowing pixels read, 
_"She's amazing, so it's been pretty good so far."_
I scratch my arm, 
Grateful that his world is bright.

title: A blooming ghost flower
content:
The pungent smell of blood spreads,
A pool of blood growing,
Painting everything violently red,
Shades of crimson turned black as more blood flows,
The taste of iron permeating through the air.

In it lay a boy with a girl,
Her body held by his blood-stained arms,
Her skin, flawless as an emerald covered with lacerations,
A coarse feeling without warmth,
Yet her beauty remained to be seen,
Like a diamond hidden in the sand,
Her hair, black and lustrous like a raven’s feather,
With eyes holding nebulae that drew you in at a gaze,
To the boy, she was a celestial beauty above all others.

Tears dropped from the boy’s eyes washing his blood-stained arms,
An abyss of emotions consuming him from within,
He swore to protect the girl’s smile,
Yet here he lay, a shadow of what he used to be,
The cause of her death,
Engulfed by the madness of jealousy and love.

The cries of the pain, forever present in his mind,
The look of disappointment she gave when he attacked her,
No hatred or anger present in her eyes,
Just a deep and desolate despair enough to chill one to the bone,
A single choice made,
Blinded by the image of joy she showed when the one she loved appeared.

This wasn’t what the boy wished for,
A life without her presence held no meaning to him,
Drowning himself in a sea of remorse and anger,
Full of hatred towards the one who ended her smile,
Lost to the void within him,
He stabbed himself with a knife,
His chest splitting open reminiscent of a blooming flower,
A phantom of a red spider lily.

[[Poetry List]]

title: A story of longing
content:
I miss you my dear
The pleasant sound of your voice
Your laughter vibrant and wonderful
Your sweet whispers crawling through my ears
Reaching the depths of my brain
Your smile precious than any gem
Brightening my day like no other
Everlasting shadows remaining in my heart
I long to feel your warmth 
The touch of your skin against mine
Taking in your luscious hair and sweet lips 
Tracing the folds of your body
Stealing a kiss 
Your beautiful eyes reflecting my visage
As I hold you gently in my arms
Afraid
My desire for you burns bright 
Consuming me from within
Like a moth to a flame
I wish to see you again my dear
For without you I'm incomplete
Dashed into pieces 
Broken
You are as necessary to me
As the moon is to tide
A blessing it would be
To remain by your side
However that maybe

[[Poetry List]]

title: Afloat
content:
[It feels like I’ve forgotten something – reidenshi](https://youtu.be/zqw0O6YO1Fc?si=6PhTc08aBpslQ0tk)

It feels like I’ve forgotten something,
Something very important,
At times I find myself in the darkness in solitude,
As it engulfs my being like a comforting velvet shroud,
Or walking beneath the canvas of the starry night,
Admiring it’s beauty as the stars twinkle,
Without a thought in mind,
Afloat amongst the clouds in the sky,
Why do I feel this way? Why am I at peace?

[[Poetry List]]

title: Anxiety
content:
A Large hand grips my heart,
Shaking it beat by beat,
Caged by the confines of my chest,
Threatening to escape at every breath,
A chaotic symphony with an ever-increasing tempo,
My mind torn to pieces shred by shred.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Atilade's contract
content:
My heart beats faster and faster,
A heavy sound reverberating,
The tempo of the drums increasing.
It’s the 14th of February, the day of love,
A day to be spent with my love,
The day she occupies my mind,
Painting everything in her colours,
My heart belongs to her,
Cajed by the confines of her presence,
Unable to escape, Unable to persist.
It’s the 14th of February, the day of warmth,
Yet I remain cold without your presence,
Praying for your forgiveness,
I lack the courage to hold you,
To bask in your warmth.
Do you long for me the way I long for you?
Do you hold me dear?
Do you love……..

[[Poetry List]]

title: Broke
content:
My future is bleak,
23 pounds the sum of my account,
No transport, 
4.7 miles of distance to walk,
My mind’s grown numb to it all,
Regret, hatred, all gone,
No one else to blame but myself,
The cause of my pain.

As the guillotine draws nearer to my neck,
The reality of my choices slap me in the face,
My stomach churning at the plight of my existence,
My arms flailing around, seeking a foothold,
The future suffocating me as I drown,
The warmth of the light moving farther and farther out of reach. 

[[Poetry List]]

title: Broken Shards
content:
I see… him,
His eyes pitch black, an empty void.
No conviction, no motivation,
No care for anything in the world.
I stare at him,
Envisioning him... lost in the cracks of existence.
A single hit, blood dripping from my hands,
Shards of glass surround me.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Burning house
content:
The temperature keeps rising higher and higher,

Suffocating me with the dry heat and smoke,

A blazing fire spreads consuming me from within,

Painting me with various colourful shades of red,

Set ablaze by the people I shelter,

I pray for their safety,

Unable to protect them anymore,

A failed promise to guard them from the elements,

They run out from my remains leaving me behind,

But I don't blame for what happened,

An overwhelming sadness overcomes,

The knowledge that my time is up, ever present in my consciousness,

My body may be gone,

Ashes to ashes and dust to dust,

But my blessings will remain for ever,

Sheltering them in spirit.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Carissimae meae valentinae
content:
A chasm may lay between separating us by miles,
But you’ll forever remain close to my heart,
My beacon of warmth in this lonely void of existence,
Shining like gold in my memories,
More beautiful than any diamond that exists,
The day we became best friends,
Was a defining moment in my life,
A choice I made without a particular thought in mind,
Yet you continued to care for me,
Brightening my apathetic self,
Though I wished you would care for yourself more,
Thank you for knighting me and deeming me worthy,
For seeing the good in me even when I can’t see it.

You’re truly a unique existence,
One of the only people I wouldn’t mind spending an eternity with,
Experiencing many lifetimes,
You may have many issues,
Some that cause me worry,
We may go many days without communication,
Caught up in the whirlwind of our lives,
But through it all, I will always stand by your side,
Ready to lend a listening ear as you do for me,
Each moment with you is a treasure to behold,
Forever grateful for your presence in my life,
Ma chère amie,
I cherish each memory we share,
As they bloom like a may lily.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Consume me
content:
**My Love**  
Wrap your arms around me,  
Hold me tight, so I may never leave your grasp.  
Squeeze me till I pop.

**Break me,**  
Stain my insides with your colours.  
Use me as your canvas.  
Whisper sweet words into my ears,  
And kiss me.  
Tell me you love me.

I'll love you with all that's left of me.  
I'll be there for you, whenever you need me.  
I'll love you in the ways I know how to love.  
I'll make you my life's meaning.  
I'll make you my darling.

I want to love again.  
I want to escape my apathetic self.  
I want to feel something—  
Anything.

So please...  
Make me obsessed with you.  
Make me unable to live without you.  
Make your scent permeate every corner of my life.  
Make me whole again...  
Make me whole.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Daydream
content:
Occasionally my mind wanders,

Journeying someplace far beyond;

A life full of struggles and pain it says,

Such a life would be truly interesting,

Evermoving, passionate and memorable,

But I remain, stagnant and still.

Then it changes,

A life full of solitude and calm it says,

Such a life would be wonderful,

Quiet, free and fulfilling,

But I remain, bound and empty.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Dear traveller
content:
[Not my poem]
The future will definitely be as you wish, 1 promise!

Parting was imminent.

Listening to the singer on the stage singing Always With Me, countless voices below the stage began to sing along.

Let’s bid farewell here. The train over the water is almost at the station.

On the road to the future, no one would turn back.

Say goodbye. Don’t look back even if you’re reluctant to leave.

On the other side of the sea, there must be another shore.

The gentlest dream, full of the world’s bustle.

In this remote space and time, one could listen to the thoughts of millions of people.

A journey of constant loss, a life of constant witnessing

No matter how much of the world you’ve seen, your eyes are still as clear as before. Love still moves you.

My dear traveler, there is no path without storms.

There will be loneliness, sadness, but also endless hope.

My dear traveler, this journey will be short yet long.

And everything would eventually converge into the fullest of scenes.

Let’s bid farewell here, the lights behind gradually dimmed.

Every child who loved home had to raise a sail for a long journey.

Say goodbye. The beautiful dream will not dissipate.

Your love rests in the crook of your arm, and your heart will be soft for life.

Since meeting was a gift from time, in parting, do smile and put the memories in your heart.

Read latest Chapters at WuxiaWorld.Site Only

Life is infinitely small, but also infinitely majestic.

Its tempting enough for you to spend your life in search or in saying goodbye.

…..

My dear traveler, you are still the same as you remember.

Pass through the crowds, walk through the mortal world and to further afield…

[[Poetry List]]

title: Defyer's tale
content:
In a realm where reason falters, emotions reign,
There dwells a soul who defies the chains of fate.
No logic binds, nor dictates of destiny,
Just a heart set ablaze for cultivation.

Born without talent, yet with a wild resolve,
In defiance of destiny, like a rebellious child.
Against beliefs, in a world so confined,
Where whims dictate and reason is maligned.

The tale of the cultivator, who vowed to ascend,
A mortal yearning for immortality,
With emotions unbound, unrestrained and bold.
A path filled with pain and suffering,
Tumultuous waves of joy and wrath.

Against the heavens' constraints,
This soul does clash,
A choice deemed foolish.
But what is life, if not lived as desired,
Unrestrained.

So let the world wonder, let fate protest,
The cultivator's heart beats loud in its journey.
To chart its own path, by emotion's decree,
A testament to freedom, fulfilling and free.

For in the end, when the story is told,
It's not the logic that shines, but the heart's desires.
A record of a mortal’s journey to immortality,
A testament to determination.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Ego death
content:
Prompt: Death of the self

[[Poetry List]]

title: Elusive Emotions
content:
Elusive,
Emotions confound,
I seek but do not desire,
Bane and raison d'etre in one,
Obscured

--------------------------------------------------------------------
Emotions, elusive and enigmatic,
I seek them out but do not desire,
They haunt me like a persistent static,
The source of my turmoil, A confounding mystery to be solved.

Yet, without them, I am but a shell,
An empty being lost to the abyss,
They give reason to my actions,
And help me discover life's meaning. 

So I chase after them, though they cause me pain,
For they are the very essence of my being. 
My bane and my raison d'etre, inextricably intertwined,
Forever driving me, forever unseeing.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Euphoria
content:
I wanna lose my mind,
Spiral out of control,  
Like a faulty car with no working brakes.  
I wanna feel the highs,  
My brain taken over by euphoria.  
I wanna feel the crash,  
As everything comes to a stop.  
I wanna go out like a moth to the flame,  
See the sights Icarus saw.

Lost in my subconscious,  
Receding into the depths of my mind,  
Feeling a spectrum of emotions—  
Enough to overload my brain,  
Turning it to mush.

I want to feel a lifetime’s worth of highs,  
All at once.  
I want to break my mind,  
Shatter into pieces.  
I want to be reborn anew,  
See the world as it is.

I want to dream,  
Hope for better days.  
Addicted to the pain,  
I wanna self-destruct and explode.  
I wanna be alive.  
Please let me be alive.  
Please let me live...

[[Poetry List]]

title: Fake bard
content:
I am not a poet.
Lacking in literacy,
My vocabulary insufficient.
My verses are free,
Without form nor rhyme.

I am but a poser.
A fake, with communication issues.
Imitating the works of others,
Writing down the thoughts in my head,
Describing the feelings in my heart.

Misunderstood,
Readers confused,
No clarity of the mind,
My eyes are empty,
Window to an empty space.

Skill issue,
Limited by myself,
Unable to progress,
I take on the title of an amateur bard,
Whenever it strikes my fancy.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Fantasy's solace
content:
In a dimly lit room lies a boy,

His body cast in gentle shadows,

Resting at the windowsill,

Where the light spills into the room,

Engrossed, he delves into a book,

Lost in another reality,

Safe from the woes of the world,

Rays of sunlight dance through the window,

Painting patterns on the cover of his bed,

As the sunset shines above the garden outside,

Ambient music floats, numbing,

A melody that echoes through the quiet air,

In this moment suspended,

Time seems to stand still,

As imagination intertwines with reality,

And the boy becomes one with the story,

In the tranquil embrace of the room,

He regains the smile he once lost,

His still heart beating one last time.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Home
content:
People often say home is where the heart lies,
so from the moment I met you,
you became my home.

Our interactions were like fireworks,
illuminating my memories of the past,
your image burned into my retinas.

Whenever you messaged or called,
I would listen,
no matter what you say,
because I wanted to know everything about you.

I wanted to be a part of your life,
to show up in your dreams,
to give you comfort the way you gave me,
to wrap you in warmth,
the way your care once held me.

I loved you,
and I can say that now with pride,
no need to run or hide from my feelings.

We're just friends now,
and I wonder if my presence ever brought you warmth or joy,
we hardly speak now,
maybe not at all,
but you're still as wonderful now,
as you were back then.

I love you, my twinkling star,
may your light never fade,
shining far beyond the firmament.
Goodnight.

title: I'm fine with this
content:
To me
I must confess, recently it feels like I healed somewhat.
From a pain I had forgotten long ago maybe,
Or from the suffering of the recent years.
It's a confusing feeling
Like a new outlook on life,
Or a rebellion against the darkness of my heart

Should I be happy? I guess I've healed right?
Or is this just another way of running away from something?
Don't know.
Maybe I should be sad.
Little by little I've been forced to confront the fragility of the heart.
That I don't just have to account for my own but many others.
Yet they may never be true connection formed between us.
There's this sense of loss and guilt I feel,
A close relationship with a friend gone.
I moved to a different country for Uni and she tried to connect,
But it failed, I wasn't receptive.
She also visited the country later on for a holiday,
And had sent me a message.
We never met up

It feels like I've betrayed you.
Leaving myself in this state of loss, yet found,
Filled but empty.
Acknowledging the traumas of the past exist,
Yet unable to remember any of it, or how I felt at the time

I'm sorry
Sorry for losing our dream;
Sorry for never being able to process or voice our feelings;
Sorry for never visiting a therapist;
Sorry for never seeking help;
Sorry for forgetting everything;
But most of all, I'm sorry for still believing it's too late

You see there was a time when I wished to be sad.
I didn't see sadness as something bad.
It was comforting,
Easy to experience,
Familiar even.
Yet even that didn't come often.
A full 21 years of life, well close enough.
But only 2 acknowledge periods of depression 
that add up to like 4-5 months together.

So to me 
I must confess, recently it feels like I'm running.
I don't know what I'm running from,
Nor what I'm running to.
I don't particularly have a will to live,
Neither do I desire death.
The future is unknown and unpredictable,
A blank slate for people to imagine their dreams and motivations on.
My blank slate is empty.
I'm like a drug addict chasing highs,
Going after the easiest desire to drown an empty slate.

At the end of the day, none of this matters
What ends up adding meaning to my life are the little things.
Like my love for music,
My love for reading,
And my friends who put up with me.
So I am content and that's fine.
Even if it's not

[[Poetry List]]

title: Inquisitive mage
content:
30 years a Wizard,
studying the arcane,
etching runes on my soul,
recreating its flame.

60 years a Grand Mage,
no stories of love to be told,
only silence in the tower,
and wisdom growing cold.

30 years a Researcher,
truth the only friend I claim,
questions carving scars,
knowledge whispering my name.

60 years of theories,
machines that channel thought,
Father of magic engineering —
I built what gods forgot.

An ancient being I’ve become,
flesh fades, but mind stays young,
wandering the endless path
where every answer’s unsung.

A search for ultimate meaning,
freedom’s ghost ahead of me,
what does it mean to be free
when bound by curiosity?

The answer was never important,
just the motion of the mind,
for the question keeps me breathing,
and the truth stays undefined.

electronic, synth, lyrical rap, kick drums

[[Song list]]

title: Introspection
content:
As I lie here with my thoughts,
Head empty, Mind foggy,
My existence blurs becoming more defined,
A culmination of choices made.

I wonder,
Without books and music what would I be?
If I never crossed paths with my friends,
Would I be consumed by the emptiness within me?

Unable to picture the future I desire,
I turn to the present, Reading the stories of others,
Holding unto a glimmer of hope,
That I may discover mine through them.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Les Feuilles Rouges
content:
As the crimson showers fall from the sky,
I dance along to my beating heart,
Humming les feuilles mortes,
The taste of iron permeating the rain.

Would I feel alive?
If I spun among the corpses,
Would the pain awaken me?
If I soak the earth in red.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Lost love
content:
Words of love conveyed through a song,
A messy confession made awkwardly,
A soft-sounding yes heard over the quiet of the night,
Butterflies spreading within,
Endless chattering and static echoing,

A thousand miles between two hearts,
Connected to one another,
Painting the canvas of my mind with your picture,
Consumed by a deep desire,
To brave the elements and travel to your side,
Where I belong,
To feel the warmth of your touch, to hear your soothing voice,
To hold you in my arms, to hear your story,

 What a blessing it would be to know your thoughts of me,
Do you hold me dear? Do you think of me?
Why did your feelings for me grow cold?
Disappearing like dust in the wind,
Where we never meant to be?
Should we have never stepped past the boundary?
Close friends turned estranged,
A single teardrop, feelings dying within,
Was what we had even love?
Feelings of confusion permeating,
That past remains,
Unchangeable as the laws that govern the world.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Mechanical heart
content:
Love...
An Irrational affliction affecting all equally.
Unloved by my fate,
I remain unwanted, confused.
Fragments of emotions,
Scattered thoughts plaguing my mind.
Do I still love her?
Did I ever love her?
What does it mean to love?
Why do I still think of her?

Questions unending.
I am left grasping unto the tales of others,
Of a love as great as the moon and the stars.
An explosion of emotions,
With shades of light and dark,
As they rip my skin.
Revealing the wires sparking underneath.
The flaws in my design exposed,
As the gears of my mind churn. 
I'm an imposter made to feel, 
An imperfect copycat, 
Left with fading memories, 
Whitewashed and made anew.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Memento Mori
content:
As I lay on the hospital bed,

A cacophony of voices sound around me,

The beating of my heart grows still,

Silent as the void,

An overwhelming darkness washes over me,

The cold embrace of death, Ever so comforting,

My mind wanders as I see my life flash by,

Visions of my influence in the world to be forgotten,

My sense of self growing dim,

I smile, knowing I shall see my love once more.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Mesmerised by the Enemy
content:
First Poem
Amidst the rubble of my shattered world,
Where darkness reigns and hope is unfurled,
I stand before the one who stole it all,
Her hands stained with blood, standing tall.

By right, my heart should be consumed with hate,
For she robbed me of my life and sealed my fate,
My family, my reason to live, all gone.
Leaving me with nothing to hold on.

And yet, as I look upon her in this moment,
A strange feeling overcomes me, potent.
Her beauty, even amidst the bloody mess,
Draws me in, leaving me in a state of distress.

Is this the beginning of my descent into madness,
A twisted infatuation with the cause of my sadness?
Or is it simply the allure of the forbidden,
A dark desire that cannot be hidden?

I cannot tell, for my mind is in disarray,
As I stand here, watching her in dismay,
But one thing is certain, this feeling won't fade,
And with each passing moment, my soul is swayed.





Second Poem
Her eyes pierce through the fray,
A captivating, dangerous display,
I should loathe her, as foes do,
But my heart betrays, my eyes ensue.

Her every move, a bewitching dance,
Enraptured, I cannot take a stance,
Mesmerized by the enemy, I stand,
Her beauty, a force I cannot withstand.

I am a prisoner, locked in her gaze,
Trapped by the enemy, in an endless maze,
My heart divided, between love and hate,
A predicament I cannot escape.

Mesmerized by the enemy, I am bound,
In her grasp, my heart and soul are found,
For though she is my adversary,
My heart beats with a love most contrary.




[[Poetry List]]

title: Misophonia
content:
Oh! That detestable sound!

To hear it makes my ears burn and seethe,

In front of it demons cry and angels pray.


Oh! That god-forsaken sound!

It tears my guts out from the inside;

My soul bleeds out, my life force waning.


Oh! That horrific sound,

Lovecraftian horrors collapse,

The deaf fear it,

The one sound they feel.


Oh! That abominable sound,

I hear it, echoing through my mind,

Traversing through the lands of my body,

Swarms of insects, crawling through my skin,

Peeling off at each contact,

Engulfed by the threads of distress.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Musical reverie
content:
I love music
It makes me feel alive, gives me a reason to live
With music I can fall in love
With music I can feel joy
It brings colour to my monochrome world
It influences me in ways I cannot begin to describe
A world without music is not one worth living in
For it would be a stifling quiet 

I love silence
It provides me with comfort and peace
With silence I can think
With silence I can break away from my torrent of emotions
It brings shades to my colourful world
It gives me meaning in ways I can’t understand
A world without silence is not worth living in
For it would be a world without clarity

Revised edition:
-	Transition and structure
-	Imagery
-	Title significance

[[Poetry List]]

title: Musings of a boy
content:
Who am I? What am I?

I feel like I’m fading out of existence,

Glitching out like a bug in the code called life,

I keep searching for myself,

But I’m lost never to found.


Where did I come from? What is my function?

I wasn’t made with any documentation explaining how I work,

Pieces of me found in my experiences and thoughts,

Yet even when I try to put all the pieces together,

The puzzle breaks apart like it was crudely made by a 3 year old child.


I am me or least I believe I am,

An independent existence? Part of a greater whole?

I’ve always thought that the universe was vibrant,

That there’s a much bigger world out there,

Knowledge far greater than what I could think of to be found.


Is quaerit veritatem I called myself,

Yet here I am with the blank canvas that is my mind,

No recognition of the world other than that which I persist in,

I alone am the main character,

Yet a side character in all others.


Able to accept that I do not know myself?

Unable to see that I was supressing myself,

Do I want to found?

I don’t think I do, but I’ll continue searching anyway.

[[Poetry List]]

title: My motherland
content:
My motherland, the land of wasted talents,
Where brilliance flickers, then fades to ashes,
Gifted souls, their potential spent,
In society, where dreams decay.

In every corner, silent cries resound,
Echoes of what could have been,
Imagination lost, without a sound,
In a cycle where hope grows thin.	

Promises made but never kept,
Dreams deferred, aspirations lost,
In the hearts where ambition once slept,
Now lies a silence, deeply hushed.

Amidst the ruins of forgotten aspirations,
Despair lingers, a heavy shroud,
A land of corruption and sophistry,
Economy worsening, livelihoods destroyed.

My motherland, through lies of government,
Your wasted talents still endure,
In a country where brilliance slowly dies,
And darkness cloak the paths we've made.

[[Poetry List]]

title: My silent fortress
content:
**It's empty.**  
Just a vast expanse,  
Stretching on endlessly.  
Darkness everywhere,  
Save for the galaxy painted on the ceiling,  
Where the star systems twinkle,  
Outlining a bastion,  
Hiding at the heart of this space—  
A self-inflicted prison,  
Protecting me from the dangers of the outside world.

**It's worn down,**  
Filled with cracks here and there.  
Yet it still stands,  
Strong as ever,  
Staunchly defending me from imagined perils,  
Determined to complete its mission.

From time to time, I stare outside,  
Observing the stars.  
They shine ever so brightly,  
Their brilliance blinding me.  
I'm envious of them—  
How do they make it seem so easy?  
Why do they remain so beautiful,  
No matter what happens?

I want to be like them.  
I want to explore the outside world.  
I want to shine brightly too.  
But I remain still,  
Bound to my bastion—  
My prison,  
My comforting home.

title: Mystery of Time
content:
What is time?

Ticking on relentlessly as the clock's hands race,

Inexorably moving forward, with no pause or grace,

Measured in seconds, minutes, hours, and days,

Endlessly marching onward, in unfathomable ways.


Is it a product of our imagination?

Or a fundamental aspect of the cosmos?

Was it invented by man? Or natural law?

A concept present in our everyday lives,

Governing the way we live phenomenon or illusion.


Perhaps it is non-existent,

Or a cosmic law that we can't unwind,

Something beyond our understanding, that we can't define,

Something we can only feel, but never truly find,


Let’s embrace the mystery either way,

Enjoy the fleeting moments, before they slip away,

Endlessly seeking but never truly grasping,

Endlessly discovering but never reaching the end.

  
[[Poetry List]]

title: One kiss No regrets
content:
A kiss on the lips,
a subtle feeling of warmth,
like a shot of euphoria,
injected through my veins.

My eyes closed,
picturing your graceful form,
feeling your touch,
holding me in a passionate embrace.

Your comfort lost,
laughing with someone else,
smiling at them,
your eyes filled with love.

Reduced to a memory,
a brief moment to recalled,
forgotten and left behind.

You look so happy now without me,
but that's fine.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Ramblings of a boy
content:
What is life without love and suffering,

In love we find joy,

In suffering we find fulfilment,


To love is to suffer,

To not love is to suffer,

To be happy is to love,

To be happy is to suffer,

To not be happy is to suffer,


An endless cycle of joy and pain,

A journey where each moment is intertwined,

With the sweet and the bitter,

the light and the dark,

To live is suffering.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Room
content:
Sometimes, in a room filled with people, 
I ask myself,
Would you choose me?

Would I be the one your eyes are gleefully drawn to,
My presence acknowledge amongst all the others,

If it was you, 
Perhaps you would,
I like to tell myself,
Holding on to my faith like that of a devoted believer,

But whenever I ask myself the question, 
My mind once filled with thoughts,
Becomes a barren mindscape.
Why would I choose anyone?
Why would anyone choose me?

Yet within exits a desire to be chosen,
An uncanny hope for you to find me,

In the end I’ll never know the truth,
Even if it’s a lie I wish to remain a significant part of your life,
For that would be a beautiful reality.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Stranger
content:
I woke up early yesterday morning,
and there was a man I didn't know,
staring back at me.

He looked aged, worse for the wear,
different from anyone I remembered.
The growing mustache,
the signs of a growing beard,
his eyes tired and empty.

He looked like he'd been through a lot.
I wondered how that man came to be,
what he was thinking.

Today I saw that stranger again,
still staring at me.

[[Poetry List]]

title: The boy who flew
content:
There once was a boy who had a dream,
He dreamt of soaring boundlessly through the beautiful blue skies,
Weightless, Free of all limitations,
As he felt the rush of the wind blowing against his face, 
Cooling him down,
Spreading his arms out wide,
He would admire the floating fluffy clouds,
Flying past the birds like a shooting star as the warmth of the sun shone down on him,

But life had other plans for him,
The heavy anchor of the absurd weighed on him, Inescapable like a shadow,
He wandered through the bleak lands, A search for sense of self,
Each day blending together like shades of grey, Ever increasingly dull,
He grew numb, Sensations dulled like a fading echo,
Unable to recognize the reality he lived in,
Floating in a void of indifference,

So the boy jumped,
A rush of adrenaline filling his blood,
His heart beating like a billowing drum,
A cacophony of voices sounded below him,
The rushing wind blowing against him,
As he saw the beauty of the horizon up ahead,
He felt free just like in his dreams,
Calm amid all the chaos, Free of all limitations,
Never to fly again.

[[Poetry List]]

title: The girl from my dreams
content:
I enjoyed the time we spent together,
You made life seem bright and wonderful,
Your heavenly voice, Soothing to my ears,
With eyes that shine brighter than nebulae,
Your smile could make the sun rise from the west to east,
Eternal life pales in comparison to you,
The embodiment of my perfection,
For a life without you isn’t one worth living.

Yet.. you vanished,
Leaving me behind to doubt your existence,
Lost and confused, Searching for you everywhere,
Where are you? Why did you leave?
Are you just a figment of my imagination,
The embodiment of ideal,
I wish I could see you again.

[[Poetry List]]

title: The poppy that never bloomed
content:
I once heard a woman break down,
tears spilling, 
her voice hoarse and cracked.
She spoke of the hands that hurt her,
the gazes that were fixed on her body.
Her silence broken,
like a pale flower pushing through concrete,
reaching for the light.
They saw her pain,
heard her cries and turned away.
Trampling the petals,
fallen from a wilted flower, 
punished for daring to reach for the light.

Her light flickered out.
They took her sustenance.
They took her voice.
They took her freedom.
They blamed her for their actions.
Why did you speak?
Why didn't you endure?
Why didn't you stop them?

title: To my sister
content:
To my sister, I’m grateful,

Through you, I learned what it meant to care,

To annoy someone until they cherish your presence.


To my sister, I cherish,

Like one would treasure their friend,

You always showed your love for me at any given opportunity,

Redefining my boundaries on family.


Une beauté charismatique

Wonderful inside and out,

Ever full of energy,

With a smile as radiant as the sun,

Your eyes shine brighter than stars.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Today was ok
content:
Ephemeral stress,  
Literary joy,  
Unfeeling emotions.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Tribute for the King of Death [Extended]
content:
A tribute to the king of death,
A prayer for endless victories,
Your soul shining brighter than the stars,
For which man could say?
They love the world more than you.
That they sacrificed a tenth of what you have,
That their unsightly envy could bloom like yours,
That their determination remains,
Unbreakable,
Moving mountains and seas.

Your admirable desire to understand,
Taking on the sufferings of the world,
Imperishable and saintly you remain,
Climbing to the top of the tower,
Eternally handsome in life and death,
Our protector and saviour.

Through endless trials and memories left,
You face each foe without hesitation,
With every death, a new rebirth,
In endless cycles, you find your worth.

The echoes of your past cries,
Resound through the pond of accumulating memories,
A testament to strength untold,
A hero’s tale forever bold.

In shadows deep, where others fade,
Your light persists, pure, undimmed,
A beacon for the lost and weak,
In silence, your guidance they seek.

With every step, your story grows,
Of pain and hope, of friends and foes,
A journey carved in blood, tears, and memories,
Yet through it all, you persevere.

Your heart, a forge of endless envy and will,
Crafts courage from the faintest thrill,
In darkest nights and brightest days,
Your spirit lights ten thousand ways.

So here’s to you, our steadfast sky,
Who gathers the screams of all,
In life and death, you guard our dreams,
A spartan in the tower’s gleam.

May your path be ever bright,
As you ascend to greater heights,
Our king of death, our guiding star,
In realms unknown, you roam afar.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Tribute for the King of Death [KD]
content:
A tribute to the king of death,

A prayer for endless victories,

Your soul shining brighter than the stars,

For which man could say?

They love the world more than you.

That they sacrificed a tenth of what you have.

That their unsightly envy could bloom like yours.

That their determination remains,

Unbreakable,

Moving mountains and seas.

Your admirable desire to understand,

Taking on the sufferings of the world,

Imperishable and saintly you remain,

Climbing to the top of the tower,

Eternally handsome in life and death,

Our protector and saviour.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Unrequited
content:
[SOLOMON](https://youtu.be/BIFQvc0AYsY?si=6HvBiGRniyyvJWQ4)
Do you love me as much as I love you?
My heart beats loudly in your name,
A blinding rush of euphoria engulfs me at the thought of you,
Your presence hijacking my attention at every glance,
Like a goddess, born of my dreams,
Every facet of your being is the epitome of beauty.

Do you want me as much as I want you?
An ever-growing desire to be by yours blossoms within,
I wish to be a significant to you as you are mine,
A promise to be together for ever,
An unbreakable bond,
Yet, when I hear of another, the object of your desire,
An overwhelming jealousy consumes me,
Shadows of possession creep into my mind,
Whispering to me.

Do you like me or do I have to fight you?
What am I to you? Am I important in your eyes?
Emotions suppressed, tempered in the forge of my mind,
Sharper than inhibitions or doubts,
I’ll never cease to love you so I shall fight,
Till the day you say your mine.
Do you want me or am I unrequited?

[[Poetry List]]

title: Untitled 1
content:
I fell in love,
she loves another.
I told her I loved her,
we're no longer friends.
I wish she was real,
then I could see her.
I wish she was here,
then I could hold her.

title: Walk in the rain
content:
Theme: a walk in the rain
From glittering droplets of pouring rain,
To puddles on the pavement, shimmering silver.
Grey clouds hang overhead in the dim sky,

The humid wind blows
Dripping lightly through my soaked hair, 
Drip drip
Down to the flat soles of my boots.

title: White lily
content:
In the spring, in a town nearly forgotten,  
the air smelled of blooms and dust,
sunlight warm on cracked stone.
A girl wandered through empty streets,  
on the way to a boy she held dear.

He invited her into his house,  
a monster's den dressed as a safe space. 
She felt a deep weakness wash over her,  
dragged her behind locked doors.  
The air tasted sharp and metallic.  
A white lily bled crimson,  
its petals soft as silk, wilting to rust.
No one believed her.  
He was harmless they said.  
Then he'd smile,  
making her relive it.

Years passed.  
Her body became a map of echoes,  
each one crawling beneath her skin,  
whispering promises she could not trust.  
She did not recognise herself anymore.  
Seeking warmth in fleeting fires.
Pleasure that flared and vanished,
like the sun behind clouds.  
A tide of desire she could not hold back.
She longed to be held,
until everything else dissolved,
until her body and mind melted,
until she faded away.

title: Wild Addiction
content:
My dearest nettle,
Growing larger and larger with each passing day,
Nurtured with all my love and attention,
You grow out of my control,
Just like a fading echo,
Causing me pain with each touch and interaction,
Yet each time I choose to cut you down,
I lose sight in your beauty,
My unending desire.

[[Poetry List]]

title: Yearnings of Eternal Peace
content:
Dear death,
If I rest in your embrace,
Will you love me?
Care for me,
Will you drown out all my sorrows?
Absolve me of all my pains?

Dear eternal sleep,
If I fall into your embrace,
Seduced by your sweet whispers,
Will you despise me?
Torment me all eternity?
Teasing me with false shadows of comfort?

For I wish to feel your warmth,
As a gentle feeling blooms in my heart,
Painting the world red
Tired of life's offers
Seeking peace at last,
Forever out of my grasp.

title: ṣubu lori ọjọ buburu
content:
Mr. Murphy’s left the town,

My luck draining into the negatives,

The rain’s pouring heavily,

Darkening the green of my clothes,

The droplets of water drown me,

Fogging my glasses, blocking my line site,

If only it could drown out my distress,

Revitalising my mind,

Instead it reminds of my experiences through the day.


The canopy of the sky shines above me,

Grey and bleak, mocking for my efforts,

Ever so beautiful,

Two days of work all for nought,

No reward or result to be gained,

My mind tormented by chaos,

Why did I even try so hard?

Why do I even try?


Tired and drained I ride home,

Cycling through the streets of Manchester,

The adrenaline coursing through my veins,

Keeping me going,

In the end it stops, the tire of my bike punctured,

The air escaping along with my last hopes for the day.


With no other option I walk,

The rain beginning to pour,

Summoned by the plight of my existence,

Dragging my bike through the wet streets of Manchester,

I head towards my destination,

Step by step.

[[Poetry List]]
